Amendments2005—Par. (7). amended par. (7) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (7) read as follows: “ ‘railroad’ means a rail carrier subject to part A of subtitle IV of title 49, and includes the National Railroad Passenger Corporation; and”.Pub. L. 109–591995—Par. (7). substituted “rail carrier subject to part A of subtitle IV of title 49” for “common carrier by railroad or express, as defined in section 1(3) of the Interstate Commerce Act ()”.Pub. children.text: “Association” means the United States Railway Association;
“final system plan” means the final system plan and any additions thereto adopted by the Association pursuant to the Regional Rail Reorganization Act of 1973 ( et seq.);45 U.S.C. 701
“includes” and variants thereof should be read as if the phrase “but is not limited to” were also set forth;
“Office” means the Rail Services Planning Office of the Commission;
“railroad” has the meaning given that term in ; andsection 20102 of title 49
“Secretary” means the Secretary of Transportation or his designated representative.
